title: Fiscal policy and governance within Economic and Monetary Union
summary: This is a high-level ECB overview/navigation page listing general research areas of interest related to fiscal policy and EMU governance, including fiscal spillovers, debt sustainability, EMU integration, and structural reforms. The page contains no specific data, policy decisions, research findings, or publication date. It appears to be a section index rather than an archiveable research document.
why_it_matters: This source has no direct market relevance. It is a structural index page describing broad ECB research interests in fiscal policy and EMU governance rather than delivering substantive analysis or data that would inform market participants.

issues_found: Source is a navigation/listing page confirmed by 'All pages in this section' footer text
No publication date provided in source metadata
No URL provided in source metadata
No substantive research content: only lists general areas of ECB research interest
Contains no data, numbers, specific findings, or actionable analysis
CORE RULE 5: Navigation pages must be rejected
CORE RULE 6: Missing attribution and thin low-signal sources bias toward reject

notes: This source is a navigation/listing page that indexes ECB research areas on fiscal policy and EMU governance. It contains no publication date, no URL, no specific data, and no actionable research findings. Per CORE RULE 6, navigation pages should be treated as non-archiveable. The content describes general areas of interest (fiscal spillovers, debt sustainability, EMU integration, banking union, capital markets union) but does not provide any actual research output, commentary, or data. Low quality source that should not be included in the finance research archive.
